sentences.arabic: الْحُصُولُ عَلَى نَوْمٍ كَافٍ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je neophodno za mentalno zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is necessary for mental health.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الأَطِبَّاءُ بِالنَّوْمِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari preporučuju spavanje osam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors recommend sleeping for eight hours every night.

sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ العَمِيقُ يُسَاعِدُ الجِسْمَ عَلَى التَّعَافِي مِنَ التَّعَبِ.
sentences.translation: Dubok san pomaže tijelu da se oporavi od umora.
sentences.translationEn: Deep sleep helps the body recover from fatigue.
